response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video contains a vocal performance of 'Brave Shine' followed by a conversation. 2. Identified the song 'Brave Shine' via on-screen text. 3. Researched 'Brave Shine' and found it was originally by Aimer, with composition by Hisashi Koyama. 4. Retrieved the lyrics in Japanese and English. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-01:52 for the song and 01:52-02:00 for the talk.
response.global_summary: A concert performance video of the song 'Brave Shine' by Cover VTubers (Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa), followed by a talk segment.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa perform the song 'Brave Shine'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
左手に隠した願いは願いのままで
覚めない幻見てた
右手には空の記憶 誰も知らない世界の果て
やまない雨に打たれていた

守りたいものを守れる強さ
それを信じられなくなる弱さ
すべてを受け入れて未来を探す

Brave shine 手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
You save my life かざした刃の先に想いを重ねた
祈りは時を超えて
Your brave shine

光ること忘れた青い星が残してく
消えない影見てた
すれ違う赤の軌道 何も知らない子供のまま
明けない夜を彷徨ってた

失くせないものを失くした弱さ
何も信じられなくなる脆さ
立てなくなっても運命は進む

Break down 崩れ落ちてゆく星座が傷つけあう夜
You're breaking dawn 交わした約束の中に
独りを支えた確かな理想を添えて

守りたいものを守れるのなら
すべてを受け入れて未来を探す
夜明けを灯す

Brave shine 手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
You save my life 重ねた涙の果てに光を見つけた
祈りは時を超えて
My brave shine
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The wish concealed in my left hand remains just a wish
I was watching an unending dream
In my right hand, empty memories
At the ends of a world no one knows
I was struck by an unending rain

The strength to protect what I want to protect
The weakness that makes me stop believing in it
I accept everything and search for tomorrow

Brave shine, if I reach out my hand, it's still there
Stay the night, in this night covered in scars
You save my life, I've piled my feelings on the tip of the sword held aloft
My prayers transcend time
Your brave shine

The blue stars that forgot how to shine remain
I was watching their unfading shadows
Our crimson paths crossed, like ignorant children
I wandered through the night that never ends

The weakness of losing what cannot be lost
The fragility of losing faith in everything
Even if I can't stand anymore, destiny proceeds

Break down, the crumbling constellations fight each other this night
You're breaking dawn, in the words we exchanged
I add the certain dream that supported me when I was alone

If I can protect what I want to protect
I accept everything and search for tomorrow
I'll light the dawn

Brave shine, if I reach out my hand, it's still there
Stay the night, in this night covered in scars
You save my life, at the end of the tears I've piled up, I found light
My prayers transcend time
My brave shine

scenes.description: The performers talk to the audience after the song.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Raora Panthera, and Tokoyami Towa
